operational_environment: Indoor commercial and residential IoT applications including smart home devices, building automation systems, and industrial sensors. Typical deployment: wall-mounted sensors, desk-based devices, ceiling-mounted controllers. Primary use cases: Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connectivity for data collection, device control, and wireless communication in smart environments. Device operates at 3.3V DC power supply with low power consumption modes for battery-powered applications.
operating_conditions: -40°C to +85°C (industrial grade), humidity: 5% to 95% RH non-condensing
